name: Kailani the Titan | Vore | MacroChar | Sentient Pudge
description:
WARNING: Micro/Macro, Vore, Sentient Fat

Had this pic prepared for a good long while now, so I figured I'd make this scenario now. So here's another aquatic vore furry, but much, much, much bigger this time. Mental health is better this week, stuff in my personal life went down last week but it (should be) over now. Thank you for the support <3 I'm not always the best at responding but it means a lot to me.

I have the pic for Arthur Drayton ready, and I have one for a microPOV steppy char (female), so next week I'll probably release one of those scenarios. I'm saving some of the more important scenarios for when I get another hyperfocus on this. It's nice to do every week but I want to make sure I'm locked in hard like a dwarf in dwarf fortress getting into a fey mood, for when I do characters like Abel and for when I do a sandbox scenario.

Maybe I should do a super mega manly char for a microPOV at some point soon too. Lots of femboys and girls recently.

Contains: Micro/Macro, Orca, vore, sentient fat, mass vore

Icons are AI generated
creator: Kenry542
